title: Residential Solar
description: CEC-accredited rooftop solar for Australian homes with STC rebates applied upfront.

prose: CEC-accredited rooftop solar for Australian homes with STC rebates applied upfront.
<ul class='feature-list'><li><svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2.5" stroke-linecap="round" aria-hidden="true" focusable="false">
Tier-one monocrystalline panels (REC, Jinko, Trina)
String or microinverter options (Fronius, SolarEdge, Enphase)
DNSP approval and meter upgrade coordination
STC rebate claimed at point of sale
Monitoring app with production and export data

10-year Sunterra workmanship warranty
Typical system: 6.6 kW (16–18 panels) generates ~9,500 kWh/year in Sydney (Zone 3), saving $1,400–$2,000 AUD annually at 32¢/kWh self-consumption.
